description_long: This is a modern, industrial-style shelving unit featuring three long, rectangular wooden shelves supported by thick, gray metal side frames. The shelves are constructed from wood with a natural grain finish, and two of the shelves each have a single, centrally placed drawer with a rustic, weathered wood front and a small round pull. The metal side supports run vertically along the edges, providing both structural stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The open design allows for easy access from the front and sides, making it suitable for storing or displaying items. The drawers offer concealed storage, while the open shelves can accommodate larger objects or decor. The overall construction suggests durability and a blend of rustic and urban design elements, making it ideal for use in garages, lofts, or urban living spaces.
description: A modern industrial shelving unit with three wooden shelves, gray metal side supports, and two rustic wood drawers. The open design and sturdy construction make it suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three wooden shelves, two central drawers with rustic fronts, and gray metal side supports.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wooden shelves and the vertical alignment of the metal supports.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the drawers and the open structure of the shelves, with metal supports visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the depth and layered arrangement of the shelves.
